basics.name: Amandeep Singh "Aman" Talwar
basics.label: AI-Enabled Operations Strategist · Developer Experience · Large-Scale Program Leadership
basics.summary: Strategy and program leader with 20+ years driving large-scale, complex initiatives across software and semiconductor organizations, and 7+ years managing globally distributed teams. Operate at the intersection of business, product, and engineering — structuring highly complex information to align senior stakeholders and convert ambiguous goals into repeatable, deployable solutions. Currently leading the adoption of AI and agentic tooling (MCP) to re-imagine and automate content and developer workflows: defining the strategy, building the toolchain, and operationalizing it into release processes.

work.name: Microchip
highlights: Managed a global team and contributed to business-unit strategic planning, aligning quality, timing, and process to company objectives.
Owned capacity planning, risk forecasting, and stakeholder-approved program plans; led an enterprise-wide FrameMaker → DITA XML transformation with full change management.
Identified recurring solution issues across teams and collaborated cross-functionally to mitigate future risk.

education.studyType: PG Honors Diploma in Computer Applications
